.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.why_exists: Node.js 12 is end-of-life and may not support modern frontend tooling or dependencies required by the application.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed for the deployment strategy.
Add build steps to copy source code and run Maven package command.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile only set up the environment; the new one needs to actually build the application artifact.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint to run the built JAR file instead of starting a bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to run the application, not just provide a shell environment.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the explicit framework configuration for react-webpack5, which is required in newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: const WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning = require("./webpack-plugin-fail-build-on-warning"); ... webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Update baseUrl path to remove leading slash for standard jsconfig resolution.
Add include directive to explicitly scope the configuration to the src directory.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser-based integration testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0.
Add new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different runtime environments.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and explicit section markers.
